name: K.d.lang's Indonesian Salad with Spicy Peanut Dressing
recipeIngredient: Firm tofu, 1 lb (patted dry), cut into 1/4 inch cubes
Potatoes, small, boiled and cut into bite-size wedges
Green cabbage, shredded, 1/2 of a small head (lightly steamed)
Mung bean sprouts, washed thoroughly, 1/2 lb
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil and salt in a medium frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add tofu in small batches and sauté until lightly browned on both sides, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel.
3. Arrange bean curd, potatoes, spinach, and cabbage on individual plates.
4. Prepare the dressing by placing all ingredients in a blender and blending until smooth. If too thick, add another teaspoon of water.
5. Top vegetables and bean curd with bean sprouts and dressing, then serve immediately.
